## What capability is missing?
Describe the review problem or workflow gap.

## Proposed improvement
What should the skill do differently?

## Example scenario
Give a concrete paper / BP / code / competition / creative-work scenario.

## Why this improves the repo
Explain whether this improves coverage, rigor, usability, or evaluation.
